'''Mer-9''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] assigned by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to observe the actions of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] and the pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces in [[Verena City]]. To do this, Mer-9 worked as a translator and assistant to [[Aarica Vost|Bren-Aarica Rordan]] in her shop.

{{Droid-stub}}
